name: azdo-tf-plan-viewer
description: Azure DevOps extension to visualize Terraform plan output

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build:task && npm run build:tab && npm run copy-assets && npm run install-task-deps
scripts.copy-assets: npm run copy-task-assets && npm run copy-tab-assets
scripts.install-task-deps: cd buildAndReleaseTask && npm install --omit=dev && cd .. && cp -r buildAndReleaseTask/node_modules dist/buildAndReleaseTask/
scripts.package: npm run build && tfx extension create --manifest-globs vss-extension.json --output-path dist/
scripts.dev:prepare: npm run build:tab && npm run copy-tab-assets && rimraf .dev && copyfiles -u 2 "dist/tab/**/*" .dev/ && copyfiles -u 1 "dev-fixtures/**/*" .dev/
